'''√sh-ch-l''' ('''kashachal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queazen|queazen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queazen|queazen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-ch-l
|-
! Lemma
| kashachal
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishachal || jishachal || shishachal || kishachal
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushachal || jujushachal || shushushachal || kukushachal
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushachal || jushachal || shushachal || kushachal
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushachal || jushachal || shushachal || kushachal
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshachal || jeshachal || sheshachal || keshachal
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshachal || jojoshachal || shoshoshachal || kokoshachal
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshachal || joshachal || shoshachal || koshachal
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshachal || joshachal || shoshachal || koshachal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shachal || shachal || shachal || shachal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shachal || shachal || shachal || shachal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shachal || shachal || shachal || shachal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shachal || shachal || shachal || shachal
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshachal || jæshachal || shæshachal || kæshachal
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashachal || jajashachal || shashashachal || kakashachal
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashachal || jashachal || shashachal || kashachal
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashachal || jashachal || shashachal || kashachal
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashachal
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashachal
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashachal
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashachalnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashachalnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashachalnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashachalshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashachalnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashachalshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashachalro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashachalnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashachalro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashachalmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashachalnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashachalmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashachalsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashachalnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashachalsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashachalng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashachalnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashachalng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashachalya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashachalnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashachalya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashachalyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashachalnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashachalyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashachalnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashachalnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashachalnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashachalnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashachalnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashachalnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashachalnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashachalnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashachalnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashachalshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashachalnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashachalshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashachalshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashachalnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashachalshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashachalshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashachalnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashachalshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashachalronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashachalnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashachalronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashachalroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashachalnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashachalroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashachalromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashachalnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashachalromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashachalmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashachalnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashachalmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashachalmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashachalnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashachalmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashachalmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashachalnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashachalmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
